title: Indulgent Egyptian Dry Sherry Bisque
description: A unique and decadent soup that combines the richness of dry sherry with the exotic flavors of Egypt. Perfect for a special occasion or a romantic dinner.
instructions: Heat the dry sherry in a large saucepan over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it's translucent and slightly caramelized.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the lemon juice, honey, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cayenne pepper (if using). Cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Pour in the coconut cream and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the soup simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth. If you don't have an immersion blender, you can transfer the soup to a blender in batches and blend until smooth.
Return the soup to the saucepan and season with salt to taste.
To spherify the soup, carefully pour it into a piping bag fitted with a round tip.
Pipe the soup into a container filled with ice water and wait for the soup to set.
Once the soup is set, remove it from the ice water and serve immediately.
